name: Restart SIIQ S.p.A.
summary: Restart SIIQ S.p.A., a real estate investments company, focuses on enhancing real estate assets value underlying special situations, non-performing loans, or unlikely to pay. It also focuses on the provision of specialized real estate services. The company was formerly known as Aedes SIIQ S.p.A. and changed its name to Restart SIIQ S.p.A. in December 2018. Restart SIIQ S.p.A. was founded in 1905 and is based in Milan, Italy. Restart SIIQ S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Augusto S.p.A.
